00001| import { isAddress } from 'viem'
00002| 
00003| export const sanitizeInput = (input: string): string => {
00004|   return input.trim().replace(/[<>]/g, '')
00005| }
00006| 
00007| export const validateAddress = (address: string): boolean => {
00008|   return isAddress(address)
00009| }
00010| 
00011| export const validateAmount = (amount: string, decimals: number = 18): boolean => {
00012|   if (!amount || amount === '0' || amount === '') return false
00013|   
00014|   const regex = /^\d*\.?\d*$/
00015|   if (!regex.test(amount)) return false
00016|   
00017|   const parts = amount.split('.')
00018|   if (parts.length > 2) return false
00019|   if (parts[1] && parts[1].length > decimals) return false
00020|   
00021|   try {
00022|     const num = parseFloat(amount)
00023|     return num > 0 && isFinite(num)
00024|   } catch {
00025|     return false
00026|   }
00027| }
00028| 
00029| export const validateChainId = (chainId: number): boolean => {
00030|   return Number.isInteger(chainId) && chainId > 0
00031| }
00032| 
00033| export const sanitizeUrl = (url: string): string => {
00034|   try {
00035|     const parsed = new URL(url)
00036|     if (!['http:', 'https:'].includes(parsed.protocol)) {
00037|       return ''
00038|     }
00039|     return parsed.toString()
00040|   } catch {
00041|     return ''
00042|   }
00043| }
00044| 
00045| export const validateSlippage = (slippage: string): boolean => {
00046|   const num = parseFloat(slippage)
00047|   return !isNaN(num) && num >= 0 && num <= 50
00048| }
00049| 
</file>
